final_orientation.name: XY-flat with 30° tie-in
final_orientation.rationale: Aligns primary load with strong XY scan tracks; 30° tie-in balances support access and residual stress.

support_strategy.removal_plan: Wire-EDM or CNC machining to remove anchors; plan datum surfaces.

actions.action: Build Taguchi DOE matrix: laser power × scan speed × hatch spacing
actions.verification: Select parameter set maximizing density and minimizing residual stress SN ratio

actions.action: Perform stress-relief heat treatment and HIP on all fatigue-critical builds
actions.verification: Residual stress < 100 MPa via hole-drilling or XRD

actions.action: Obtain qualified engineer review before flight-critical production
actions.verification: Signed design review and NDT plan

test_print_plan.model: Stress-relief test coupon with similar wall thickness and overhangs
test_print_plan.fallback: If residual stress > 100 MPa, reduce scan speed and increase preheat; re-run DOE

evidence_links.claim: DMLS residual stress managed by scan strategy and heat treatment
evidence_links.source: DebRoy et al. residual stress review

evidence_links.claim: HIP improves fatigue life of Ti64 DMLS
